# Debrief: ZetaLabs — Senior Product Designer — Hiring manager — 2026-04-25

## What Landed
- Architecture+CS background was a clear differentiator
- Two case studies landed strong with one HM

## What Fumbled
- **How would you justify this to the CFO?** — business framing weak again

## Interviewer Signals
- **Pat Lee** (Hiring Manager): Positive → wanted to push to next round
- **Rita Sharma** (Sr Design Manager): Negative → felt level might be too senior

## Comp / Timeline / Process
- Mentioned $150K-$185K

## Gut-Feel Verdict
5/10 — split decision evident

## Verdict
Lost (split decision) — managers couldn't agree
